tools.name: acp_spawn
tools.description: Spawn an external coding agent (e.g. Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI) via ACP to work on a task. The agent runs as a subprocess and streams results back. Use this when you want to delegate a coding task to an external agent that has its own tools, file editing, and terminal access.

agent.description: Which agent to spawn (e.g. 'claude', 'codex', 'gemini'). Defaults to 'claude'.

task.description: The task to give the agent — what it should accomplish

cwd.description: Working directory for the agent (defaults to current session's working directory)

reason.description: Brief explanation of why this tool is being called
